languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

languages.text: "Его отказ ремонтировать Нунциуса — возмутителен и нарушает обеты, данные им перед лицом Бога-Машины. Я немедленно призову его на мостик, в надежде, что он не посмеет юлить в присутствии Вольного Торговца!"

"His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"
languages.original_text: "Его отказ ремонтировать Нунциуса — возмутителен и нарушает обеты, данные им перед лицом Бога-Машины. Я немедленно призову его на мостик, в надежде, что он не посмеет юлить в присутствии Вольного Торговца!"

"His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

"His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

languages.text: «Su negativa a reparar a Nuncius es un ultraje y una infracción del juramento prestado al Dios Máquina. Lo convocaré inmediatamente al puente. ¡Espero que no se atreva a prevaricar en presencia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: «Su negativa a reparar a Nuncius es un ultraje y una infracción del juramento prestado al Dios Máquina. Lo convocaré inmediatamente al puente. ¡Espero que no se atreva a prevaricar en presencia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».

languages.text: “他拒绝修理努恩修斯的行为简直骇人听闻，更违背了他向万机之神许下的誓言。我这就传唤他来舰桥，但愿他在行商浪人面前不敢再闪烁其词！”
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: “他拒绝修理努恩修斯的行为简直骇人听闻，更违背了他向万机之神许下的誓言。我这就传唤他来舰桥，但愿他在行商浪人面前不敢再闪烁其词！”

languages.text: « En refusant de réparer Nuncius, il commet un véritable outrage et viole par là même le serment qu'il a fait au Dieu-Machine. Je vais immédiatement le faire venir sur la passerelle, en espérant qu'il n'osera pas mentir en présence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ! »
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: « En refusant de réparer Nuncius, il commet un véritable outrage et viole par là même le serment qu'il a fait au Dieu-Machine. Je vais immédiatement le faire venir sur la passerelle, en espérant qu'il n'osera pas mentir en présence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ! »

languages.text: "Nuncius'u onarmayı reddetmesi bir rezalet olup Makine Tanrı'ya ettiği yeminleri ihlal etmekte. Hür Tacir'in huzurunda lafı dolandırmaya cesaret edemeyeceği umuduyla onu derhâl köprüye çağıracağım!"
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'u onarmayı reddetmesi bir rezalet olup Makine Tanrı'ya ettiği yeminleri ihlal etmekte. Hür Tacir'in huzurunda lafı dolandırmaya cesaret edemeyeceği umuduyla onu derhâl köprüye çağıracağım!"

languages.text: "Seine Weigerung, Nuncius zu reparieren, ist unerhört und verstößt gegen die Eide, die er dem Maschinengott geschworen hat. Ich werde ihn umgehend auf die Brücke rufen und hoffen, dass er es nicht wagt, im Beisein {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} die Tatsachen zu verdrehen."
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: "Seine Weigerung, Nuncius zu reparieren, ist unerhört und verstößt gegen die Eide, die er dem Maschinengott geschworen hat. Ich werde ihn umgehend auf die Brücke rufen und hoffen, dass er es nicht wagt, im Beisein {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} die Tatsachen zu verdrehen."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスの修理拒否は暴挙であり、機械神に誓った誓約の違反だ。ローグ・トレーダーの面前で口裏を合わせないよう、直ちにブリッジに呼び出す！」
languages.original_text: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスの修理拒否は暴挙であり、機械神に誓った誓約の違反だ。ローグ・トレーダーの面前で口裏を合わせないよう、直ちにブリッジに呼び出す！」
